name: backend
description: ``` backend/ ├── config/ │   └── database.js          # MongoDB connection setup ├── models/ │   ├── Project.js           # Project MongoDB schema │   └── Blog.js              # Blog MongoDB schema ├── routes/ │   ├── projects.js          # Projects API endpoints │   └── blogs.js             # Blogs API endpoints ├── middleware/ │   └── errorHandler.js      # Global error handling ├── scripts/ │   └── seed.js              # Database seeder ├── server.js                # Main Express server ├── .env.example             # Environment template └── README.md                # This file ```
